Test Steps: 1. Open Admin web app (browser). 2. Navigate to Login page. 3. Enter valid email/username and password. 4. Click Login. 5. Verify dashboard loads.
Expected Result: Admin logged in successfully; dashboard displayed; JWT token stored in localStorage; user info visible in header.

Test Steps: 1. Open Admin app. 2. Enter valid email and incorrect password. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Login fails; error message displayed (e.g. "Invalid credentials"); no token issued; user remains on login page.

Test Steps: 1. Open Admin app. 2. Enter non-existent email/username. 3. Enter any password. 4. Click Login.
Expected Result: Login fails; appropriate error message; no token issued.

Test Steps: 1. Open Admin app. 2. Leave email blank; enter password. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Validation error; login button disabled or "Email required" message displayed.

Test Steps: 1. Open Admin app. 2. Enter valid email; leave password blank. 3. Click Login.
Expected Result: Validation error; login prevented.

Test Case Description: Admin Login - Account locked after 5 failed attempts
Test Steps: 1. Attempt login with wrong password 5 times consecutively. 2. On 6th attempt use correct password.
Test Data: Same email; wrong then correct password
Expected Result: After 5 failures account locked; correct password still fails; lockout message; must wait lockout period (e.g. 2 hours).

Test Steps: 1. From same IP attempt login 10+ times in 1 minute.
Expected Result: After threshold; 429 Too Many Requests or temporary block message.

Test Case Description: Admin Login - Session expired / Expired JWT
Test Steps: 1. Log in as Admin. 2. Wait until session expires or manually clear token. 3. Perform any protected action (e.g. view orders).
Expected Result: 401 Unauthorized; redirected to login page; appropriate message.

Test Steps: 1. Log in as Admin. 2. Click Profile/User menu. 3. Select Logout. 4. Confirm if prompted.
Expected Result: Session ends; redirected to login page; token cleared from localStorage.
